creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with a couple of changes: 
- GetFontDirs needs execute permission, so use INSTALL_SCRIPT for it. 
- Instead of patching tkfont for the location of wish, use sed to 
replace the provided name with $(LOCALBASE)/bin/wish8.0. 
- Add tk80 to CATEGORIES line. 
- 
- Previous line unintentionally left blank. 
- Slightly edit pkg/COMMENT; we don't need the name of the software there. 

Thanks!  Looks like a pretty handy tool.
